source_pr.title: executor: make test TestForServersInfo stable
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: crazycs520 <crazycs520@gmail.com>

<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

### What problem does this PR solve?

as title said.

evidence: evidence: PR title: make TestForServersInfo stable.
evidence: switches to infosync.GetServerInfo() instead of iterating GetAllServerInfo(), avoiding nondeterministic server-list behavior in test (executor/infoschema_reader_test.go).
